name: update-github-skills
description: Audit, check, and safely update locally installed GitHub-sourced agent skills.

interface.longDescription: Inventory locally installed agent skills, detect Git or manifest-backed GitHub sources, dry-run upstream changes, and update only after explicit confirmation with backups.
defaultPrompt: Use $update-github-skills to check my local skills for GitHub updates.
Use $update-github-skills to inventory my Codex and Claude Code skills.
Use $update-github-skills to dry-run updates from my skill source manifest.
